• abt/
  • int/
  • proj/
  • ctc/

Tristan here, welcome to my website with a focus on simplicity, clarity and frugality.

My philosophy is about keeping things simple, minimal and usable. I believe this should become the mainstream philosophy in the IT sector. Unfortunately, the tendency for complex, error-prone and slow software seems to be prevalent in the present-day software industry.

diaries 日记

2026/
2026-06-06

Rewrote wmenu.sh in C, but not sure if I want to use it. Also wrote a few html email templates for professional usage.

2026-06-05

Revised Anki flashcard first thing in the morning. Spent most of the day programming CS50x.

2026-06-04

Applied for jobs, scoured job listings on Linkedin, feeling a certain lack of interest and motivation to continue pursuing work in Singapore. However, it is still a good and simple day programming, revising Anki flashcards and Duolingo.


Major changes I have made to index.html. Cleaned up the page by removing dead code and incorporated JSON for long-term maintainability. It's great!

2026-06-03

Revised Anki flashcard first thing in the morning. I need to build this habit.

2026-06-02

Explored local-hosted open source AI models Ollama. Other than that, not much motivation to do much else.

2026-06-01

ID 0730 Morning ferry back to Singapore. Arrival 1030 local time. Singaporean Uncle Ang from Bukit Panjang accompanies.

2026-05-31

Sent off Serlina's yeye to the next world at 1230. Restorations follow suit. Return ferry booked for next morning.

2026-05-30

Breakfast from Sinar Bodhi Jl. Bakar Batu. 3 veges, 1 meat. Serlina has tamie.

2026-05-29

Ferry to Tanjungpinang in the morning.

2026-05-28

Explored wmenu versus wofi and how to debloat, whilst still figuring out which is ideal for my Linux setup. Wayland or x11?


MaRe not feeling well today, perhaps it was due to fatigue from all the events that happened recently. Serlina was there to bring her to see a doctor in Tanjungpinang.

2026-05-27

Today I worked on my personal site by cleaning up and adding the diary section you are looking at. 1130 Ferry ticket to Tanjungpinang bought.

2026-05-26

An important day for mum. Facial spa for her in the morning. For lunch, we had Tonkatsu Ramen. Grandma, Mum and I celebrated with a Strawberry Rose flavoured cake and Din Tai Fung dinner.

2026-05-25

A sudden passing of Serlina's grandpa. A travel from Tanjung Pinang, to Batam and Johor meant a late night arrival. Midnight rendezvous. Cardiac Arrest at 03:30. Frantic calls and pleas for help. Ambulance on site at 04:30. Police at 05:30. Arrangements follow suit. Same day return at 16:00 finalised.
